metadata.title:
WATER FLOWS IN
NEW CITY MAINS

EXTENSION OF WATER SYSTEM, RUSHED BY THE


COUNCIL, WAS COMPLETED TODAY

pages.raw_text:
Cold, clear, pure city water Is to-
day flowing from the mains Of the
people In a portion Of the Cannon
dale district, recently redeemed
from the oppression Of the Jones
water autocracy, by the grace OF
the city council, and as result Of
the fight The Press has conducted
against the Jones system.


In two or three weeks more, If
good weather prevails, Cannondale,
Orchard Heights and all of the
northeast section of the city for
meriy supplied by the Jones water
system. will enjoy the blessing of
pure city water, served through
steel mains, laid and owned by the
people.


There will be no more petty tyr
amy by the Jones water monopoly
that has retarded the development
of that section of the city for the
last two or three years. Cannon.
dale will be included within the
beheficient zone supplied by the
water system of the city of Spo-
kane. and incidentally will enjoy
better and cheaper service, with
out the petty exactions that have
hitherto prevailed.
